name: iSniff-GPS-ng
summary: Repository indexing entry for the ``iSniff-GPS-ng`` project. Index entry in the KFIOSA catalog. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner. Attribution and provenance only; audit code, releases, and licence before use in the lab or production environment.

usage_sections.content: Web UI: `python main.py` (serves http://localhost:8000, /docs, /admin). Live capture: `sudo airmon-ng start wlan0` then `sudo venv/bin/python services/capture.py -i mon0`. Pcap import: `venv/bin/python services/capture.py -r capture.pcap`. Prod: `uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --workers 4`.

examples.command: Web UI: `python main.py` (serves http://localhost:8000, /docs, /admin). Live capture: `sudo airmon-ng start wlan0` then `sudo venv/bin/python services/capture.py -i mon0`. Pcap import: `venv/bin/python services/capture.py -r capture.pcap`. Prod: `uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --workers 4`.

algorithms: passive 802.11 probe-request sniffer via Scapy monitor-mode capture
client profiling indexed by MAC with OUI/manufacturer enrichment (netaddr)
client-to-probed-AP correlation through ClientAPLink table (reverse SSID->BSSID tracking)
Apple wloc WiFi positioning via protobuf-encoded BSSID query (proto/BSSIDApple.proto)
Wigle.net v2 API SSID/BSSID geolocation lookup
SQLite-backed persistence of Client/AP/Location entities with lat/lon per source (apple/wigle/manual)
pcap replay/import as alternative to live capture
produces: SQLite DB (isniff.db) of Clients (MAC, manufacturer, last-seen, probed SSIDs)
AP records (BSSID, SSID, manufacturer, last-probed, lat/lon, address)
Location records tagged by source: apple / wigle / manual
Interactive Google Maps heatmap with circle/polygon drawing tools
real-time UI stream of captured probe data
novelty: Not a thin airodump-ng wrapper — it only uses airmon-ng for monitor-mode setup and Scapy for packet parsing (baseline). The genuinely novel value is the geolocation-correlation pipeline: turning passively captured BSSIDs/SSIDs into physical coordinates via Apple's wloc protobuf WiFi-positioning API and Apple cell-tower lookup (regenerated proto defs, SSL-verify-disabled quirk), plus Wigle v2 API SSID geolocation, then rendering them on an interactive Google Maps heatmap with reverse SSID->BSSID network tracking across physical locations. The probe-request client-profiling data model (MAC-indexed with OUI, probed-AP link table) goes beyond airodump-ng's CSV. Architecturally novel vs original iSniff-GPS: async Scapy capture loop integrated into the FastAPI ASGI process, plus XSS/eval hardening.

trust.warning: External community repo. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use. Catalogued for the AI's awareness; novel algorithms are implemented in core/modules/catalog_recon.py, not shelled out to this repo's binaries.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
